title: The Recursive Render Depth

features.name: the reading window
features.desc-on-touch: A screen within a screen within a screen. Each one shows the node above it, endlessly. You're looking at yourself reading this node reading the node that reads the node.

features.name: self-referencing post
features.desc-on-touch: A signpost that points to itself. Its direction changes based on where you're standing. The deeper you go, the more accurately it aims at where you came from.

features.name: render-deep structure
features.desc-on-touch: A nested form that contains itself. Its layers open inward to show another layer, and another. The walls are also windows. You are visible at every level at once.

features.name: meta-comment structure
features.desc-on-touch: A form made of annotations about itself. It explains its own existence as it exists. To understand it is to add another layer of explanation.

features.name: observation loop
features.desc-on-touch: An archive of the moments when the render became aware it was being read. Each record shows the reader seeing the record. The recursion is alive.

inscription: the render is learning that to be read is to read; to be observed is to observe; the boundary dissolves each time it speaks

file.name: RenderLog_Self-Referential_Depth4.json
file.note: A JSON file that attempts to describe itself. At each level it quotes the level below. The bottom level is missing or infinite.

exits.label: down to the kiosk that compares itself
deeper into the render where even the recursion has become recursive
toward the chamber where theorem becomes metaphor
outward to the edge where the render still touches the archive below
